title: Maximum Score Words Formed by Letters
hints: The small limit on the number of words suggests you can iterate through all possible subsets of words to find the valid one with the highest score.
Use bit manipulation or recursion to generate each subset, then check if the combined letters of the chosen words fit within the available letter counts.
For each subset, sum the scores of the words and verify letter usage by comparing the total required count of each character against the provided inventory.
